reference: You could be experiencing a common cold, which starts with such pains. Since all tests are negative, I do not see any other reason to worry. However, some conditions, such as Lyme disease, are hard to confirm with tests. Wait one week; if the problem persists, you need to check for other possibilities with more specific testing. Good luck.
text: You could be experiencing a common cold, which starts with such pains. Since all tests are negative, I do not see any other reason to worry.
